programme.desc: Get ready for DIY fun with miniature versions of school supplies like clipboard, markers, tape, pencil case, sticky notes, pen, glue, scissors, rulers, and more!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for seven easy and mind-blowing science experiments, followed by a galaxy-themed crafting session to create an anti-stress fidget toy!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today we're creating a toy cash register shaped like a cat for Sam's supermarket! Then let's craft and play NBA basketball board game together!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for a creative adventure as we craft delicious paper food treats and three stunning clay cakes: Egg Basket, Glittery Rainbow, and Beautiful Flower. Get ready to be amazed by these delightful creations!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today Sam and Sue are crafting a brand-new makeup kit box for your doll, then transforming miniature school supplies into DIY masterpieces!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Let's create two super-cute clay cats with accessories like a litter box, cat feeder, food cans, bed, and scratching post. Also, Sam plans to make rainbow slime with a unicorn and glitter theme!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we dive into easy acrylic painting for beginners, crafting a serene ocean scene with a sunset sky, fluffy clouds, coconut trees, birds, a couple, and a sailing boat. Get ready for a relaxing and rewarding artistic journey!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we craft a magical and cute backpack organizer in the shape of a friendly giraffe using craft foam sheets! Plus, get ready to create an adorable avocado stationery case for your desk.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we give quirky Barbies stunning makeovers, from refreshing their makeup and hairstyles to picking out perfect outfits and accessories. Get ready for jaw-dropping transformations!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for a thrilling journey into the world of paper fidget toys with 12 exciting crafts, including colorful cubes, surprise avocado poppers, paper monkeys, spinning tops, and more! Then, watch as Sue and Sam transform cardboard into a homemade Tetris game, complete with colorful bricks, a level scale, and loads of fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Guess what's brewing today? It's time for an enchanting outdoor escapade with the dynamic duo Sam and Roger! Get ready to embark on a thrilling nature journey where we'll unveil some nifty nature tricks and create our very own survival toolkit. Hold onto your hats because this adventure will be a fantastic ride!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join Sue in transforming a sad doll into a Taylor Swift superstar with a DIY makeover, complete with custom clothing, spa treatments, and concert-worthy styling. Then, dive into Sue's paper nail salon for a Trolls-inspired manicure adventure, featuring paper nail art and press-on nails for a fabulous finish!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Create a fun and glittery sticky goo factory from cardboard, and cook adorable fish-shaped buns in Kitty's street food truck! Let's jump right in and make some magic happen!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Get ready to embark on an awesome crayon adventure with Sam and Sue! Create amazing crayon crafts like mermaid tails, colorful dinos, and melting crayon art. Together, we're going to turn those crayons into the awesome art and crafts you've ever seen! Plus, learn to draw Blue Heeler Puppy's family with glitter in this easy drawing tutorial! Are you pumped? Let's dive right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Cheer up your dolls with an exciting DIY plasticine playground featuring colorful swings, a pink slide, a see-saw, a carousel, and a mini skateboard. Add a basketball hoop for extra fun and muscle training. Then, join Sue as she crafts a charming mini house from popsicle sticks, complete with walls, a roof, windows, and doors. Watch the full video for a step-by-step guide to these fun and creative projects!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey everyone! We'll show you how to create your own surprise-filled blind baggies with all the fun stuff inside. Get ready for crafting a special paper baggie learning kit about sea creatures. Join us as we dive into this delightful project. We'll create adorable paper puppies and pamper them with surprise blind bags. Unbox each bag to discover exciting treats and accessories for our paper pets, from colorful toys to cozy beds. Let's jump into the fun of unboxing these creative surprises!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey friends! Imagine Sam dreaming of the wild Safari, but Sue's bringing it to life with fun paper crafts! Let's dive into the adventure! Gather colorful origami papers and fold fantastic animals. From soaring birds to swinging monkeys and snappy alligators, we'll craft a whole zoo of 12 awesome paper animals. It's easy and loads of fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Today, we're diving into something cool: building a colorful watermelon house! Stay tuned to see this fruity dream unfold! And get ready for magic as we create the most fabulous Cinderella castle ever and give a doll a magical makeover into Cinderella herself! Let's jump in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Today, get ready for a magical crafting adventure as we create a spectacular outfit for our beautiful Queen! Using clay, we'll craft a crown, dress, and shoes filled with glitz and glam. Let's dive in and sprinkle some sparkle!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready to craft the ultimate dream house! It's gonna be legendary, so let's jump right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Guess what? We have super exciting, sparkly crafts for you today! ! We've got a whole treasure trove of mermaid crafts waiting for us, from crafting a magical mermaid jewelry box to creating a shimmering mermaid bow with glitter galore and so much more! We're also making a magical make-up set out of glittery clay in Cinderella style! How cool is that? Let's dive in and make our fairytale come true!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey friends! Today we'll create a doll with braided hair where we can store all our hairpins. It's both a chic hairstyle and a practical organizer! And that's not all — we're using balloons to craft stunning doll outfits. Excited to see how it all turns out?

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sammy invited all the little ponies and their babies to a grand adventure, but they ended up covered in sticky mud. No worries though! Sue came to the rescue with a special mud remover. After cleaning up, each pony got a stunning Rainbow-style outfit. All the pony families were thrilled with the grand makeover results!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today, we're making an amazing paper crafts: a rainbow mood indicator, an emotions board game, and lively toys from everyday materials. But wait, there's more! Join Sam on an epic dragon adventure with a playbook full of surprises! Battle games, giant dragons, puzzles, and DIY crafting—get ready for non-stop fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey friends! Get ready to wow your classmates with cute and easy DIYs! We've got 12 epic creations lined up: glittery pens, fluffy notebooks, sparkly rulers, and even yummy-looking pencil holders. But wait, there's more! We are going to craft a fantastic cardboard organizer that's not just neat, but bursting with colors too! Ready to join the fun? Let's dive in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi, guys! Today we're going to make amazing school supplies to make your school days more interesting and fun! Galaxy pencil-cases, mini notebooks, bookmarks, paperclips and much more! Guys, do you agree that with such stationary any lesson will turn into a great experience? Therefore, try to repeat these crafts yourself and your studies will become much more fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sue is taking part in a school charity fair. And she needs some easy crafts because she doesn't have much time to make them. Sam is there to help her, of course. And they will make these crafts in no time together! Ask your friends to help you make these, too! It will be fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sam's school starts tomorrow, but only today did he suddenly remember that he completely forgot to buy school supplies. Sam is devastated—how is he supposed to study now? Don't worry, silly little buddy. Susie always has something crafty up her sleeve.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Step into the enchanting world of miniature magic! From tiny furniture to intricate decor, watch as we breathe life into every corner, transforming it into a haven of charm and wonder.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: New school year has began! It's time to get organized. Slime Sam is only learning to do it. And his friend Sue is helping him by making a cool desktop organizer that will store and dispense pencils and paper and it also has an inbuilt DIY automatic pencil sharpener!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Do you want to learn how to make school cooler? Well, everything begins with you. Today, we collected a lot of useful, adorable, and very tricky school ideas for you.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Grab some paper, colorful markers, and clay and join right in these amazing paper food crafts. So, trust us, you wouldn't want to miss it!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: You can make this bright and colorful desktop organizer yourself. You'll need cardboard, colored paper, hot glue, wooden sticks, Velcro, craft foam, small pins and a few other items you probably already have at home. You can use any colors and decorate this organizer in any way you want.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Are you ready to dive into the Unicorn DIY season? It's time to unleash your creativity with magical unicorn-inspired crafts! Can you guess what awesome creations we'll be making? That's right—school supplies bursting with color and cuteness! Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Sam and Sue are in the midst of a heated board game battle! But every time poor Sue seems to end up on the losing side against Sam, the Board Game PRO! Fear not, because Sue's got a brand-new game plan up her sleeve that's sure to turn the tables this time around! Are you ready to witness Sue's crafting genius in action? Let's dive right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover the ultimate way to get gum with our vending machine featuring a breathtaking maze! Pull the lever and navigate the maze to catch a delicious chocolate coin. It’s a fun and challenging twist on getting your favorite treat!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover two exciting art projects with Sam! First, learn how to create stunning 3D paintings using DIY puffy paints for a textured effect. Then, dive into an out-of-this-world DIY mosaic astronaut and space painting using unique and simple techniques. Perfect for adding a touch of creativity to your space!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your creativity with an incredible machine that lets you design your own cartoon characters! Plus, dive into a magical cardboard game that you can play in real life. Perfect for a day of imaginative fun and games!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for a treat! Learn how to make a stunning rainbow soda bottle cake and create the tastiest, gigantic gummy worm you've ever seen. Dare to give these fun and delicious projects a try!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun panda-themed sleepover party! Explore a variety of creative doll crafts and learn how to make a charming DIY paper house to add a personal touch to your party album. Perfect for a cozy and crafty celebration!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun panda-themed sleepover party! Explore a variety of creative doll crafts and learn how to make a charming DIY paper house to add a personal touch to your party album. Perfect for a cozy and crafty celebration!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for action-packed fun with epic Hot Wheels races on a custom cardboard track! Plus, build your very own DIY cardboard ropeway at home for even more exciting adventures. Perfect for a day of creativity and racing thrills!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join Sam for a colorful crafting adventure! We'll make rainbow crafts and show you how to create your own custom stickers. Perfect for adding a splash of fun to your DIY projects!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover adorable DIYs to elevate your style! Learn how to create charming princess shoes and an incredible duck-style bag to add a unique touch to your look. Perfect for a fun and fashionable makeover!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Explore two fantastic DIY projects! First, create a cozy beach house perfect for modern mermaids. Then, build an awesome new house for Sam using cardboard. These creative ideas are perfect for adding a touch of whimsy and fun to your crafting adventures!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Embark on a journey to decorate a mini house in stunning Oriental style and create a charming miniature music room! Perfect for fans of intricate crafts and beautiful decor. Hit play and get inspired by these delightful DIY projects!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Ready to whip up some jaw-dropping treats? Join us as we create a gigantic, fondant cookie cake and colorful candy sushi like you've never seen before! Our crafty duo will guide you through these easy, fun, and delicious recipes that will have your taste buds dancing. Don't miss out—hit play and get ready to dive into the yumminess!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Ready for some girly crafts? Discover these adorable ways to make friendship bracelets and learn how to create a beautiful hair accessory organizer in the shape of a unicorn! These easy and fun DIY projects are perfect for adding a touch of magic and style to your accessories. Let’s get crafting!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi, friends! Ever wanted to become a magician or learn some cool tricks to impress your friends? Today, Sue and Sam are revealing secrets with easy and fun magic tricks using markers! Plus, we’ve got awesome balloon hacks to make you feel like a real magician. Get ready to amaze everyone with these simple yet super cool tricks! Hit play and let the magic begin!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Grab your cardboard and get ready for a fun-filled crafting adventure! We're building the cutest doll café you've ever seen, complete with display cases for delicious cupcakes, art-worthy walls, and stunning room decorations. From interior design to miniature furniture, we'll create coffee shop items! Ready to see the final result? Let’s build this adorable café together!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi, guys! We think today is a great day to make a real counting machine for cash and cons from cardboard!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Dive into the ultimate doll makeover! Watch as we give a messy doll a stunning beauty routine, create a fashionable outfit from old socks, and build a custom roofless car for the perfect doll ride. Whether you’re into makeovers or DIY crafts, this video is full of creativity and fun. Hit play and let’s get crafting!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover the joy of unleashing your creativity with our step-by-step guide to creating captivating DIY cardboard crafts. Today we'll make fashion sneakers and hydraulic powered claw machine from Cardboard! Hit play and let the magic begin!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for five amazing drawing life hacks that will inspire your creativity! We’ll kick things off with a stylish geometric fox stencil, followed by a pop-out flower bouquet and a simple rose drawing using a plastic bag (you'll have to watch to find out how!). Plus, we'll craft a cool organizer for your art supplies, complete with compartments for pencils, a paper tray, and even a pencil sharpener. Grab your cardboard and get ready for some fun surprises along the way!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get creative with this DIY project as we build a cardboard code lock safe and an amazing file folder! Follow along for step-by-step instructions and tips to create these fun and functional crafts. Perfect for organizing your space while adding a touch of creativity!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we build adorable miniature cozy multi-level houses! Watch as we create intricate designs with charming details, including cozy interiors and fun features. Perfect for crafting enthusiasts and miniatures lovers alike—let’s get started!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for some smart crafts to make bath time amazing! Join us as we create a fun DIY soap using baking soda, lemon acid, and clear glue. Watch as Sammy enjoys a bubbly bath and we whip up a truly bombastic craft together. Let’s dive in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun-filled party with our amazing inventions! We’ll show you how to create a vibrant cardboard tractor for delivering strawberries, host a hilarious soap party, and make an RC car with a bubble machine. Join the fun and bring your party to life with these creative ideas!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover six creative ways to make perfect paper toys and colorful rainbow mini school crafts! Join us for fun and easy projects that will spark your imagination and brighten up your crafting experience. Let’s get creative together!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for an exciting unboxing adventure! We’ll explore amazing blind bags featuring Envy, Disgust, Anger, and Riley from that beloved animated movie. Watch as we give Riley a fun makeover with cute clothing and accessories from the surprise bags. Plus, we’ll reveal how to create an amazing paper doll! Get ready for lots of fun and surprises!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Transform ordinary pens into fun, character-inspired creations with easy, Inside Out-themed crafts! Plus, discover 5 genius school life hacks that will make your daily routine smoother and more stylish. Perfect for students looking to add some flair to their school supplies!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Dive into creative fun with DIY projects like a sparkly mermaid treasure chest and a secret candy box to hide your treats! Learn how to craft with clay, sparkle up your designs, and unlock your crafty potential with these easy and imaginative creations.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover the secrets to mixing colors and create 16 new shades with just 5 primary colors! Plus, learn easy art techniques to kickstart your creative journey with basic lessons perfect for beginners. Unleash your inner artist with these simple yet effective tips!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create a cute, colorful 5-room house for Kitty and friends, plus a tiny dollhouse in a box! Discover fun, easy DIY techniques using clay and cardboard to craft your own miniature world. Perfect for crafting enthusiasts !

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for Halloween with a spooky DIY haunted house and a magical transformation of a doll into Elphaba, the Wicked Witch! Unleash your creativity with these eerie and enchanting projects that will bring your Halloween decorations and costumes to life.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your creativity and build your dream superhero home with this epic step-by-step guide! From transforming ordinary cardboard into epic, functional furniture to creating superhero-inspired rooms, this DIY tutorial takes you through every stage of crafting your ultimate superhero hideout. Perfect for fans of superhero adventures and DIY builders!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! You know that we love the Inside Out story, right? So, today, we decided to make no more, no less, but the whole set of nesting dolls, and each one of them is going to represent a certain emotion. How cool is that? Come on, grab some lemonade, hit play, and enjoy!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready to throw an unforgettable Moana-themed party with these fun and easy DIY decorations and craft ideas! From island-inspired decor to cute party crafts, this guide will help you create a mini adventure that’s perfect for any Moana fan!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create the perfect heart-shaped organizer for your desk and candy stash! Learn an easy technique to draw stunning romantic scenery using unusual acrylic paints. This DIY is perfect for adding a touch of charm and creativity to your workspace!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Transform your doll into a stunning mermaid in no time! Learn how to create a magical mermaid outfit with just a hot glue gun and a few simple materials. This fun and easy DIY is perfect for doll lovers looking to add a splash of creativity to their collection!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your inner witch with a Wicked-inspired beauty routine for Elphaba! DIY your very own paper beauty box filled with magical surprises and kawaii school supplies. Watch as we create mystery blind baggies with all things cute and enchanting – perfect for fans of Wicked and all things whimsical!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Learn how to craft your very own Whack-a-Mole game using cardboard, and discover the secrets behind a mind-blowing magic trick! This DIY project combines the fun of crafting with a magical twist, perfect for anyone looking to add a little creativity and wonder to their day.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for some gooey fun with easy and safe experiments! Watch as we fix the cheapest sticky goo and dive into satisfying science experiments with liquids and slime. Perfect for anyone who loves a little hands-on creativity and a lot of squishy satisfaction!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for some hands-on fun with this DIY paper hospital playbook and doctor kit! Learn how to craft your own paper stethoscopes, bandages, patient charts, and more in this step-by-step guide. Perfect for little doctors and creative minds who want to explore the world of medicine with a fun, paper-powered twist!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get creative in the kitchen with these fun and vibrant cookie and rainbow dessert recipes! From chewy cookies to colorful confections, learn how to make your treats as bright and delicious as a rainbow. Perfect for celebrations or just satisfying your sweet tooth!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create your own magical winter retreat for Elsa with this fun DIY project! Build a charming mini house complete with frosty decor, snowflakes, and icy touches. Perfect for crafting enthusiasts and Frozen fans alike!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Turn your cardboard into a creative, portable Barbie house with this simple and fun DIY! Learn how to make a mini swimming pool party setup, complete with lounge areas and pool accessories for dolls. Perfect for imaginative play and crafting enthusiasts!

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Investigative documentary series examining the use and abuse of power.

programme.title: El Beso Inmortal: La Reina De La Noche
programme.desc: Las vacaciones italianas de dos universitarias chocan con un antiguo ritual. Pero a veces los rezos se convierten en cazadores.

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Los Vigilantes del Ródano
programme.desc: Octavio, un misterioso hombre que se dedica a acoger a personas con pasados di3ciles recibe a Carmela, una periodista de espectáculos sin escrúpulos; Román, un arrogante músico de rock y Diego, un cínico escritor autor de la exitosa trilogía “Johnny King”. Todos ellos se encontrarán atrapados en un enigmá6co estudio de grabación. Por más que lo intentan, no logran salir de este lugar. Se ven obligados a tratar con los músicos invitados para grabar allí y las situaciones confusas que con ellos se generan. Todo esto mientras intentan averiguar cómo conseguir escapar del estudio y encontrar la razón por la cual se encuentran recluídos

programme.title: La Leyenda De La Deseada
programme.desc: Recién llegada a Villaldama, Lizzy, apodada "La Deseada" por su belleza, se enamora de Fernando, un joven humilde. Sus padres la encierran para evitar la relación, mientras Lizzy cae misteriosamente enferma. Elsa, su madre, recurre al Padre Reyes, un sacerdote que deberá enfrentar los oscuros hechizos de Teresa, una mujer obsesionada con Fernando.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna. En el campo, su familia está padeciendo una gran sequía. Su padre Ernesto, lo recibe a punta de pistola mientras que su perro Arón lo protege imponiéndose amenazante contra su padre. Ernesto decide, en contra de la voluntad de su hijo, sacrificar al perro familiar que se ha vuelto cimarrón. Arón, el perro sacrificado, emerge de su tumba y sus fantasmagóricas apariciones amenazan la cordura de Ernesto y sacuden los cimientos de la familia, que queda a merced de sus impulsos salvajes.

programme.title: Escape En Vivo
programme.desc: Un investigador paranormal descubre una tierra de nadie infernal en un remoto y olvidado paisaje desértico donde payasos malvados esperan en un purgatorio sobrenatural para enfrentar su destino como venganza por sus malas acciones.

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper

programme.title: Superfight - Andre Galvao vs Braulio Estima by Stuart Cooper
programme.desc: In this video Andre Galvao looks back on his match with Braulio Estima for the ADCC 2013 Super Fight Title. Then, Andre recaps on some of his most entertaining matches from ADCC 2011, which include; Don Ortega, Gunnar Nelson, Pablo Popovitch, Rousimar "Toquinho" Palhares and Sergio Moraes.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: 10p Team Duel - Blue Belts Run It Back - Part 1
programme.desc: 8 teams of 10th Planet's best up and coming athletes battle it out in a submission only tournament. Which team will earn the bragging rights as 10th Planet's baddest blue belts?

programme.title: 10p Team Duel - Blue Belts Run It Back Part 2
programme.desc: 8 teams of 10th Planet's best up and coming athletes battle it out in a submission only tournament. Which team will earn the bragging rights as 10th Planet's baddest blue belts?

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights
programme.desc: A 16-man jiu jitsu tournament. Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system for a qualifier tournament at the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles. The winner will go on to compete on the big stage at Combat Jiu Jitsu Worlds

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes breakdowns of Clark Gracie's and Baret Yoshida's Crucifixes, Nathan Orchard's signature move, The Dead Orchard and Marcelo Garcia's arm drag.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8
programme.desc: This Episode breaks down the double buggy choke from 10pQ 19, Geo Martinez's twister, Genki Sudo's flying triangle, and Tarik Hopstock's Tarikoplata.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.title: Black Sheep Boxing with Zack Moore - 10pATX
programme.desc: After struggling with addiction himself, Jeff Meadows opened Black Sheep Boxing along with his friend Sky Wood with the purpose of giving recovering addicts an opportunity to turn their lives around. Join 10th Planet ATX's Zack Moore as he visits Black Sheep Boxing to learn the art of boxing.

programme.title: Breaking -Pro Breaking Tour - NYC Battles
programme.desc: The Pro Breaking Tour brings the top 8 breakdancing teams to New York for an intense head-to-head competition. Watch as the world’s best dancers showcase their athleticism and artistry in a high-energy battle for the championship title

programme.title: Breaking - King Of Scratch
programme.desc: DJ Battles and community cut sessions - Scratching is a gateway into hip-hop for old and new generations, inspiring them to think outside of the box and to create synergy through music . We're throwing down this week, celebrating 50 years of Hip Hop and BBOY City's XXIX (29th Anniversary)."""

programme.desc: "Tune in for an exciting college wrestling matchup as Utah Valley takes on Cal Baptist! Expect intense action and fierce competition as these determined teams clash on the mat"

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.desc: Chill travels to France to join some of the biggest names of female surfing for a day's relaxation. An inside look at the technique needed to perform at the highest level in kitesurfing. A meeting with Izuki Tanaka.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: In this episode, everyone on their boards! We look at skateboarding, kiteboarding and surfing!

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: In this episode, we go down the slopes on two wheels in indoor BMX, on mountain bikes in Andorra and in motocross with the X-fighters in FMX.

programme.title: Only Live Once
programme.desc: Montpellier welcomes the FISE festival. We then head for South Africa to witness the world Street Skate championships in the Kimberley Diamond Cup, and we meet Australian BMX legend Logan Martin.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Great Britain's Brownlee brothers finish their triathlon in emblematic manner, Niki Lauda bears the scars of an infamous FI fireball, and US ice hockey produces a miracle at Lake Placid.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: From the 4 metre longboards of yesteryear to the rapid shortboards of today, surfing has given birth to many legends. But who is the greatest surfer of all?

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars find out about the best champions of combat sports, including the greatest Chinese boxer, Zou Shiming, Gina Carano, who reached Hollywood via UFC, star commentator Joe Rogan, and the champions who became politicians.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The decision which robbed Lewis Hamilton of the F1 2021 world championship.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Maradona's hand of God and the rivalry between Marquez and Pacquiao.

programme.title: Football Stars

programme.title: Foul Play

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Secretariat, Frankel, American Pharaoh and many others contest for the title of greatest racehorse of all time.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the best champions of combat sports, including Nicola Adams and Marlen Esparza, two women who dominate their sport. We look back at Ronda Rousey's difficult year. Finally, Wayne Rooney tries his hand at wrestling.

programme.title: Football Stars

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The Hand of God, cheating or genius?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: It's the battle of the long-distance runners, with African athletes in front. Haile Gebrselassie, Eliud Kipchoge and Abebe Bikila are among the greatest of all time.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the greatest champions of combat sports, among them the MMA fighters Angela Lee and Paige VanZant along with their colleague Michael Bisping. Hollywood is a fan of combat sports: here's the proof, with Demi Lovato and Stallone.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: Zlatan Ibramovic took the media by surprise with his ego and has placed the world at his feet. Sir Alex Ferguson put his genius at the service of Manchester United to make it into an empire, and Roy Kean has defied the authority of more than one coach...

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: We have known no greater clash than the three fights between Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier, but there has been a more controversial one than between Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield. Plus, possibly the most awaited fight of all time between Mayweather and Manny Pacquiao.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode of Homage, we pay tribute to two of the most rebellious players to have kicked a football. It's Diego Maradona, the little Argentinian god venerated despite his addictions and his disrespect for the rules, and Eric Cantona.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: El Clasico, the famous derby between FC Barcelona and Real Madrid. In this episode, we plunge into the best known stories of rivalry between the clubs, from the civil war to the clashes of modern times which have marked the two clubs.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: Whether in sport or in the wider world, there is nobody more unconventional than Dennis Rodman. This episode, devoted to basketball, pays homage to Dennis the Menace who restored some colour to the NBA.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode, we pay homage to two of the oldest and fiercest rivalries in football: the North West derby between Manchester United and Liverpool, and the match between Rangers and Celtic in Scotland. But you don't need decades for a rivalry to take root. We also pay homage to the Hudson Derby, the clash between New York City FC and the Red Bulls of New York. We pay tribute to all of them.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The 1999 French Open final between Martina Hingis and Steffi Graf and Michael Schumacher's 1995 season with Benetton have marked the history of sport.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: N'Golo Kanté has won the biggest prizes over the past few seasons, but he remains humble. Sergio Ramos has won a lot of prizes during his career, but he is known for his lack of discipline. In this episode we celebrate the two extremities.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The impact of partiality and aggression of crowds on tennis matches.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Report on the greatest boxing rivalries of all time.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the champions of combat sports, with Wladimir Klitschko back in the ring in 2017, the kickboxing passion of actor Idris Elba, the new love life of Tito Ortiz and a focus on Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this football special episode, we pay homage to George Best and to the talented and turbulent Paul Gascoigne, as well as to Mario Balotelli.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode, we pay homage to the charmers of the round ball: from the fantastic manager Jose Mourinho, to the Brazilian magician Ronaldinho, via the coolest of footballers, the Italian Andrea Pirlo.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this boxing episode we hail a fighter who gladly captured the sport's attention over two decades, the all-conquering, all-spending Floyd Mayweather Jr. We also give a shoutout to Manchester's giant Gypsy King, Tyson Fury. They are two of the biggest personalities of the fight game, and to both we pay homage.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: We pay homage to the daredevils of the king of motor sports, Formula 1. Like the handsome kid James Hunt, the man without fear, Niki Lauda or the glacial Kimi Räikkönen.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this special football episode, we pay tribute to the tough-as-leather Sergio Ramos and the king of the crotch-grab, Vinnie Jones. And for extra flavour, we also salute charismatic coach Jurgen Klopp who has overwhelmed the footballing world with his personality.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: John McEnroe was the king of the courts for a while whereas Andre Agassi rebelled by bringing some colour into the game. And Novak Djokovic lived through his highs and lows under the eyes of the public throughout his career.
