programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: Croatia Yacht Show & International Charter Expo - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.7 - Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 1
programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 1
programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of sun-drenched Sail-Ho Croatia! We are on the beautiful island of Hvar getting a little bit tipsy, but seriously the wine here is so good and so is the food. For the ultimate refreshment we have the appetizing crystal-clear sea around us, and we cannot refuse a dip in its warm waters.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Amazon Warrior
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a camp of Amazon women is raided by a gang of murderous bandits, who kill everyone in the camp except one small girl. She grows up to be a mercenary, and one day... See more »

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1934)
programme.desc: A man and his wife receive a clue to an imminent assassination attempt, only to learn that their daughter has been kidnapped to keep them quiet.

programme.title: Six Black Horses
programme.desc: A beautiful woman with an ulterior motive hires two gunslingers to escort her through Indian territory so she can be reunited with her awaiting husband.

programme.title: Ladies Crave Excitement
programme.desc: Bored rich girl hooks up with news photographer, gets caught up in his adventures.

programme.title: Three Desperate Men
programme.desc: When they learn that their brother Matt Denton is awaiting trial in California, charged with train robbery, deputies Tom Denton and Fred Denton leave their home in Fort Grant, Texas and head west.

programme.title: Young and Beautiful
programme.desc: Bob Preston, publicity man for Superba Pictures, uses his publicity skills in an attempt to make this fianc?e June Dale the most famous movie star in the world. But in doing so, he forgets that women want to be attended to for themselves, not as objects of fame.

programme.title: Heart of Arizona
programme.desc: Belle Starr has returned from time in prison only to face a hail of bullets, along with rescue by Hoppy and the Bar 20 gang.

programme.title: Life Returns
programme.desc: A doctor who has spent his career working on ways to revive the dead sees his chance to prove his theory by performing his procedures on a recently deceased dog.

programme.title: Spook Town
programme.desc: Dry Gulch Trading Post owner Kurt Fabian advances money on mortgages to the local settlers to finance an irrigation program. Three Texas Rangers, Tex Wyatt, Jim Steele and Panhandle Perkins transport the money in a strong box which they place in the Wells Fargo safe as agent Sam Benson assures them that he is the only one who knows the safe combination. Fabian conspires with Bill Gunner, Breed Crocker and Trigger Booth to steal the money and they fail, but Fabian gets it on his own. Benson is arrested, and a committee of citizens, led by Oscar Perrin accuse Captain Wyatt and the Rangers of carelessness and request the resignation of the Captain if the money is not recovered. Fabian owns the abandoned ghost town of "Mystic", and Gunner, Crocker and Booth take him there to force him to tell where he has hidden the money, They shoot at his feet to intimidate him and he dies from fright and shock. Tex, Jim and Panhandle are also searching the town and they find Fabian's body. Benson tells Lucy Warren that the money may be hidden in the old Wells Fargo office in Mystic and they go there and find the strongbox. Enter Gunner, Crocker and Booth. Enter the Rangers. Gunfight.

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: The Range Busters arrive to see if they can find out who has been robbing the stage of the mine payrolls. Crash is a big winner in Faro Wilson's card game and when the winning bills are later checked, they are found to be from the mine payroll. When the mine manager is seen sneaking into Faro's office, the Range Busters know how Faro learns of the shipments and they are ready when the next payroll goes out.

programme.title: The Arizona Gunfighter
programme.desc: When Colt kills the man that murdered his father, he escapes his pursuers and joins Wolf and his outlaw gang. After two years Wolf breaks up the gang, deeds his ranch to Colt, and turns himself in. Now an honest rancher, things are going fine for Colt until Wolf's old gang shows up under a new leader. Colt get the Governor to release Wolf claiming the two of them can bring in the gang.

programme.title: Between Men
programme.desc: When his young son is shot, John Wellington kills the culprit and flees. But his son Johnny recovers and is raised by Sir George. Some twenty years later Johnny sets out to find Sir George's missing granddaughter. He finds her and also finds Rand, but neither of the two men realize they are father and son.

programme.title: Lights of Old Santa Fe
programme.desc: Rival rodeos are operated by good guy Gabby and bad guy Richard Powers. Dale is trying to choose between them, aided ultimately by Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers (who are radio singers).

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Emotions
programme.desc: Welcome to Meditations for Manifesting, how to bring yourself back into alignment with the greater good and pray from a place of wholeness and true faith. Episode one is all about the emotions. Begin with breath awareness, establishing a calm and steady mind. Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.desc: Today, Kino answers a student question about how to deal with neck pain in your yoga practice.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Light the Fire – Downward Dog
programme.desc: If you're feeling not so flexible, this course is where you should be! This class is focused on understanding shoulder mobility in the fundamental yoga asana called downdog,

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Potion Apoptogenic Golden Mylk
programme.desc: Golden milk is a turmeric based Ayurvedic potion that has numerous benefits for both your mind and your body. Enjoy this tea any time of day and start to notice the difference in how you feel. Less than 10 minutes.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Creamy Butternut Squash Tomato Soup with Grilled "Cheese"
programme.desc: It’s everyone’s favorite combo – creamy tomato soup and a grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Bali
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Creamy Butternut Squash Tomato Soup with Grilled "Cheese"
programme.desc: It’s everyone’s favorite combo – creamy tomato soup and a grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Bali
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Acceptance
programme.desc: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment. Join Kino as she skillfully uses upward facing dog as a tool for understanding this radical acceptance. Start with a short meditation on the breath and a feeling of being ok with the sensations in the body. Then begin the physical practice by awakening the central axis of the spine, extending and twisting your way through some warm up positions. Detail your alignment in the updog backbend with nuanced alignment work, making use of blocks where needed.

programme.title: Marichasana A
programme.desc: Tune in to the inner experience in this short flow that details a healthy use of breath and body in your yoga practice. This class builds up to Marichasana A.

programme.title: The Light at the End of the Tunnel, Happiness after the Storms of Depression Clears with Rob Mack and Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Happiness Coach, Robert Mack.

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Relaxation
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Acceptance
programme.desc: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment. Join Kino as she skillfully uses upward facing dog as a tool for understanding this radical acceptance. Start with a short meditation on the breath and a feeling of being ok with the sensations in the body. Then begin the physical practice by awakening the central axis of the spine, extending and twisting your way through some warm up positions. Detail your alignment in the updog backbend with nuanced alignment work, making use of blocks where needed.

programme.title: Marichasana A
programme.desc: Tune in to the inner experience in this short flow that details a healthy use of breath and body in your yoga practice. This class builds up to Marichasana A.

programme.title: The Light at the End of the Tunnel, Happiness after the Storms of Depression Clears with Rob Mack and Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Happiness Coach, Robert Mack.

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Relaxation
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Material relationships
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body. Cultivate equanimity as you notice the rise and fall of physical and emotional feelings. Let Kino help you drop down beneath the frequency of thought, where you can get in touch with your innate wholeness. Work with understanding your natural completeness, as you explore concepts of attachment and aversion. Find yourself in alignment with faith, breaking the inertia of limiting beliefs and thoughts. Practice towards a state of non attachment, a fertile ground in which to plant the seeds of a happier, more peaceful life.

programme.title: Intro to Everyday Essentials
programme.desc: Sit down with Mark Robberds to discover what this Movement Essentials course is all about.

programme.title: Forward Bendings
programme.desc: In this practice, Mark will show you a brief routine he uses to work with the mechanics of forward folds.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.title: Parsvottanasana
programme.desc: This 20 minute practice starts with the basics, building a connection to breath and body. Flow through standing poses that build up to a prop supported variation of Parsvottanasana.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Vegan for Life with Devyn Howard
programme.desc: This episode of Seek Up is all about food!

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Discover Your Dosha
programme.desc: Why does Ayurveda matter and how can it help you understand yourself and the world around you? In this episode, Sahara will briefly discuss each of the three doshas and what they have to do with you and the foods you eat? Learn about how your digestion can be affected by the doshas, and how the doshas might be affecting you through this brief intro to Ayurveda with Sahara Rose. Less that 20 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Lunch for your Dosha
programme.desc: In this episode, Sahara Rose will teach you how to make a very simple Lunch Bowl that will energize your body and optimize your digestion. Plus, you’ll learn about Ayurveda’s theory of the six tastes, how to use the six tastes when constructing a meal, and what ingredients to add or avoid depending on your dosha. Less than 15 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Vata
programme.desc: Did you know that different yoga and meditation practices are recommended for the different doshas? Join Sahara Rose for a meditation that’s designed for Vata Dosha individuals. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Hour Glass
programme.desc: In this episode of Kino’s Closet, Kino talks about her favorite brand of makeup from a company called Hour Glass. This is an American, luxury makeup brand that makes professional grade products that last. Check out this episode to see what Kino has to say about these products plus, get a simple review from professional makeup artist, Nanda Quero.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer San Fran
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Something for Everyone – Half Moon
programme.desc: Today for yoga for inflexible people is a chair based practice that will help you stretch and strengthen in a supported way. Join Kino as she starts with a mindful moment and then flows through a sequence that includes lots of forward folds and side stretches.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Utkatasana
programme.desc: Join Kino (and her mom!) for a 20 minute practice focused on Utkatasana, the chair pose. This prop supported, gentle flow encourages a healthy balance of flexibility and strength.

programme.title: Invert - Awaken
programme.desc: Join Kino for a class that’s all about inversions and the mindset of awakening. This 30-minute practice invites you to seize the opportunity to remain present and awake in the challenge of the practice. Begin the journey of turning yourself upside down to awaken the sleeper within.

programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Obstacles
programme.desc: True faith is a valuable ally when facing obstacles. Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, focusing on the natural, unopposed quality of the breath. Become aware of the sensations in the body. Learn to accept thought as thought and emotion as emotion. Practice equanimity as challenge arises, settling into the calm and equanimous mind.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Potion Apoptogenic Golden Mylk
programme.desc: Golden milk is a turmeric based Ayurvedic potion that has numerous benefits for both your mind and your body. Enjoy this tea any time of day and start to notice the difference in how you feel. Less than 10 minutes.

programme.title: Yoga Is Healing
programme.desc: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to. Begin with a seated practice for checking in with breath and body, cultivating an attitude of complete acceptance. This class offers up a standing forward fold, Padangusthasana, as a vehicle for understanding what yoga is. Kino will teach you the important details of alignment while keeping a focus on not pushing too hard and instead releasing and trusting the process.

programme.title: Yoga Is Awakening
programme.desc: Yoga is a path to personal awakening. In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being. Begin with centering breath work and then flow through some warm ups and sun salutations as you bring awareness to the energetic life of the body. Take it nice and easy as you make your way into Anjaneyasana, finding and being at peace with your individual limits in the posture. Kino will guide you into feeling the sensation in the hips and spine, noticing the changes in the body and and letting the practice fuel a sense of awakening.

programme.title: Seek Up Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Healing through Yoga, from Body Image and Abuse to Peace and Love with Jessica Sayre
programme.desc: Join Kino and Jessica for a fully loaded conversation that touches on various topics.

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.title: Yin Yoga for Deep Relaxation and Healing - Open Heart - Calm Your Nerves
programme.desc: Perfect for all levels. Tune in here when you’re wanting to relax and wind down. Originally streamed live on March 26, 2020.

programme.title: Prasarita Padottanasana
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that utilizes props to both get you stronger and allow you to relax more. This class flows through standing poses and focuses on the forward fold called Prasarita Padottanasana.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Leaning into Forward Folds
programme.desc: This session is all about sitting with the hamstrings and forward bends in a state of equanimity. Join Kino as she leads you on a journey to healing. Learn to sit with your discomfort and begin to uncover and understand the intelligent messages that come from within. 25 minutes

programme.desc: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to. Begin with a seated practice for checking in with breath and body, cultivating an attitude of complete acceptance. This class offers up a standing forward fold, Padangusthasana, as a vehicle for understanding what yoga is. Kino will teach you the important details of alignment while keeping a focus on not pushing too hard and instead releasing and trusting the process.

programme.title: Yoga Is Awakening
programme.desc: Yoga is a path to personal awakening. In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being. Begin with centering breath work and then flow through some warm ups and sun salutations as you bring awareness to the energetic life of the body. Take it nice and easy as you make your way into Anjaneyasana, finding and being at peace with your individual limits in the posture. Kino will guide you into feeling the sensation in the hips and spine, noticing the changes in the body and and letting the practice fuel a sense of awakening.

programme.title: LifeStyled - Chic in Chiffon featuring Dennis Basso
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Kim Gravel - Belle BBQ Bash
programme.desc: Nothing says summer like a BBQ, and no one can host a BBQ like TV personality and style expert Kim Gravel. Let's get fired up for a Belle BBQ Bash to remember with food, fashion, friends and FUN as Kim shares her signature Southern charm with our live studio audience and special guests including Jimmy Stovall from Corky's Barbecue. It's all part of our Kim-a-thon as Kim Gravel celebrates the start of summer here at QVC®.

programme.desc: Pull up a chair and get ready to dig into the tastiest talk show because these foodies are Dishin’ It out! Pull up to the most popular potluck in town where our hungry hosts are bringing you the beginner-friendly recipes they’ve been craving—as well as the how-tos, brands, and products you need to serve them up yourself! It’s a full course meal featuring food, fun, and friends. Watch and shop, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Nakery Beauty
programme.desc: Treat yourself to glowing skin with clean bath & body care by Nakery

programme.title: Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel - Beauty
programme.desc: As a TV personality and style expert with over 25 years in the beauty business, Kim Gravel is on a mission to help women rediscover their innate worth, reignite their passions, and cultivate a deep love for themselves. That's why she created Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel- a QVC® Clean Beauty brand that reminds women that they're deserving of love, joy, and all the incredible experiences life has to offer. Enjoy fragrances that connect emotionally and performance-based cosmetics in a bold and vibrant color palette. All made easy, fun, optimistic, energetic, inspirational, and even audacious. Embrace your authentic (and confident) self, fall in love with life, and write your own empowering narrative with Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel.

programme.title: Timeless Beauty - Self-Care Secrets
programme.desc: Age is celebrated, never feared, during Timeless Beauty on QVC+ and HSN+. Designed specifically for women 40+, this original series is helping you embrace your personal beauty journey through expert hair and makeup how-tos and the latest products for mature skin available to shop as you watch. Each week, join the pro-age movement and learn how to navigate and evolve your routine for the woman you are today—and the one you’ll be tomorrow. Watch and shop anytime, anywhere, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming app.

programme.title: Aveda - Beauty
programme.desc: Cruelty-free beauty products from a leading hair and skincare brand

programme.title: #GettheLook - Get Ali Carr’s Beauty Tips
programme.desc: Build a better beauty routine in real time with perfect products and helpful how-tos during #GettheLook, only on QVC+ and HSN+. Follow along for shoppable, step-by-step demos featuring the latest looks and deals on the beauty bag essentials you need to effortlessly achieve them. And don’t worry – watch, shop, and practice along with past episodes anytime, anywhere, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Jane Seymour
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.

programme.title: The Foodie's Guide to Menopause - Salmon & Firecracker Broccoli
programme.desc: As a registered dietitian, Vanessa Rissetto knows that your food should do more than taste good: it should help you feel good, too. Cook along with Vanessa as she writes the chapter on The Foodie’s Guide to Menopause and learn how to create fresh and flavorful recipes packed with feel-good ingredients to fuel you. From mealtime to meal prep, get tasty food inspiration to support and nurture you on life’s journey—and shop the essentials you need to recreate them at home. Stream this original series exclusively on the free QVC+ and HSN+ TV streaming service.

programme.title: Belle by Kim Gravel - Fashion
programme.desc: Believe in Your Own Beauty with Belle by Kim Gravel. Founder Kim Gravel knows how to bring out the beauty in every woman - from working for major cosmetics and fashion brands to designing her own clothing and styling countless fashion shoots to having her own Lifetime TV show transforming women all around the country, Gravel's passion is to empower every woman to be her beautiful best self. Exclusive to QVC, the Belle by Kim Gravel collection of figure-focused fashion helps you create a head-to-toe look that flatters your body no matter your shape and empowers you to Believe in Your Own Beauty.

programme.title: IHKWIP - Handbags & Accessories Clearance
programme.desc: "IH-KWIP" is not only the phonetic spelling and pronunciation of the word "equip," it's also the name of one of the hottest new brands of handbags, luggage, and accessories. After being uprooted from their NYC fashion industry jobs during the pandemic, IHKWIP co-founders Anthony Nota and Baylen Edwards-Miller headed to the suburbs and got to work to create bags that solve problems. Blending fashion and function with city style and suburban sensibility, IHKWIP bags hold everything you need, right where you need it.

programme.title: Over 50 & Fabulous
programme.desc: What would we talk about if there was a safe space where (almost) nothing was off-limits? If there was a welcoming community of women who aren't afraid to be their authentic selves? Find out during Over 50 & Fabulous, where celebrity makeup artist Mally Roncal and an alternating QVC® Program Host (whether they're over 50 or approaching it) gather to get real about the real stuff. Like menopause, dating, empty nesting, the effects of gravity - and that just scratches the surface. Our Over 50 & Fabulous weekly series and after-show livestreams offer a place for women like us to feel seen. To listen. To be understood. And to connect with each other with courage and confidence. So let's "go there" and get fearless. Together. Our time is now. Our place is here. We're Over 50 & Fabulous, and we wouldn't have it any other way.
